overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a moonlit forest at night. The character navigates through grassy terrain, white birch trees, and dense undergrowth in a continuous exploration sequence with atmospheric blue-green lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open birch forest clearing with wildflowers

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through grassy forest terrain with white birch trees visible on the left

entered.detail: tall white-barked birch trees with sparse foliage visible on the left side of the path
lush green grass covering the forest floor with scattered plants
dense dark forest trees forming the background horizon
small yellow flowers scattered in the grass on the right side

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open forest clearing at night, surrounded by white birch trees and lush green grass. The scene is illuminated by moonlight with a cool blue-green atmospheric tone, and yellow wildflowers are visible scattered on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest undergrowth with thick leafy bushes

events.description: entering area with dense leafy bushes and thicker vegetation
camera partially obscured by leaves while passing through dense bush foliage

agents.ego_description: pushing through dense foliage and navigating around thick leafy bushes

entered.detail: thick green leafy bushes with dense foliage partially blocking the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a denser section of forest with thick leafy bushes crowding the path. The vegetation becomes more enclosed, partially blocking the sky, and the birch trees recede into the background as Geralt pushes through the undergrowth.

events.description: exiting dense bushes into more open area with visible grassy mound ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along forest path and passing a grassy mound on the right side

entered.detail: large grassy hillock or mound rising from the forest floor

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dense undergrowth, the scene opens to reveal a grassy mound ahead. Geralt continues walking past the birch trees which are now closer again, and the camera follows as he passes the grassy mound on the right side while the forest opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit forest that shifts from an open clearing into dense thickets before expanding once more. It begins with Geralt walking through a wide expanse of lush green grass and white birch trees, where yellow wildflowers dot the ground under a cool blue-green atmospheric glow. As he advances, the environment becomes more enclosed, with thick leafy bushes crowding the path and partially obscuring the night sky. The scene then opens up as the character pushes through the undergrowth, bringing the birch trees back into close view. Finally, the camera follows him past a grassy mound on the right as the forest terrain broadens again.
